title: rubus additus
intro: Rubus additus is a lesser-known species of wild raspberry, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Rubus additus include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus additus include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
